{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "EcoStruxure Geo SCADA Expert is purpose-built SCADA software used for supervising and controlling industrial field devices, fitting the definition of an IoT orchestration/controller layer; the vulnerability lies in its application logic, so it affects the application layer, making it IoT-specific.",
  "category": "scada/controller",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "The vulnerability is in the firmware of a Foscam indoor IP camera, which is a purpose-built IoT device in the consumer space. The flaw resides in the device’s web management interface (part of its firmware), so it belongs to the device layer.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "consumer iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "Honeywell Experion PKS is an industrial control system composed of embedded controller modules that directly monitor and actuate physical processes; these controllers are purpose-built for industrial IoT/OT deployments and constitute active functional IoT elements. The buffer-overflow flaw resides in the firmware/software of those modules, i.e., the device layer.",
  "category": "controllers",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Suprema BioStar 2 is a server application that manages network-connected biometric readers and door controllers, which are purpose-built IoT devices in physical access-control systems. The vulnerability is in the management software (application layer).",
  "category": "access control",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "Bosch IP Helper is a companion configuration utility specifically designed to discover and manage Bosch IP cameras, which are IoT devices. The tool is purpose-built for this IoT deployment context, so a vulnerability in it directly affects the IoT ecosystem at the application layer.",
  "category": "cameras",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "GE Proficy CIMPLICITY is SCADA/HMI software used to supervise and control industrial devices—an active element in Industrial IoT systems. The vulnerability is in its web application component, fitting the application layer of the IoT ecosystem.",
  "category": "scada",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",
  "reason": "The vulnerable products (Schneider Electric EcoStruxure Power Monitoring Expert / Energy Expert / Power SCADA Operation) are specialized industrial software platforms used to monitor and control power-related field devices (meters, breakers, sensors) over OT/IIoT networks. They act as the application-layer controllers in an Industrial IoT deployment; therefore the vulnerability directly impacts an IoT ecosystem component rather than general-purpose IT software.",
  "category": "scada/energy management",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",
  "reason": "B. Braun SpaceCom2 is a connectivity module embedded in B. Braun infusion pumps, a purpose-built medical IoT device. The flaw is in the firmware’s lack of data authenticity checks, affecting the device layer itself, hence it is an IoT-specific vulnerability.",
  "category": "medical device",
  "sector": "healthcare iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "communication",
  "reason": "Mosquitto is an MQTT broker—MQTT is a lightweight publish/subscribe protocol purpose-built and predominantly deployed for IoT communications. The broker is an active functional element in many IoT systems; a crafted MQTT CONNECT packet causing DoS therefore directly impacts the IoT communication layer.",
  "category": "network infrastructure/gateway",
  "sector": "other"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "application",

The flaw lies in the application’s installation directory permissions.",
  "category": "sensors",
  "sector": "industrial iot"
}

{
  "label": "IoT",
  "component": "device",

{
